vllm.title: [Minor] Add comment on skipping rope caches
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Added a comment to explain the reason for adding the logic.

vllm.title: Replace head_mapping params with num_kv_heads to attention kernel.
vllm.author: wbn03
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Replace head_mapping params with num_kv_heads to attention kernel.
Base on this issue:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/1928
To avoid the head_mapping load from global memory.

vllm.title: Fix completion API echo and logprob combo
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #1967
The bug comes down that somewhere in echo code path, logprobs's conditional existence was not fully considered.
I have tested the following four requests and all working:
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/completions  -H "Content-Type: application/json"      -d '{ "model": "facebook/opt-125
